# Noshi (熨斗) — Japanese Gift Envelope Generator

> https://noshi.moab.jp

A free, bilingual (Japanese/English) web tool for generating *noshi* (熨斗) — the decorative paper bands printed on Japanese gift envelopes (*noshigami*, 熨斗紙).

## What it does

Users fill in three fields and download a print-ready JPEG:

- **Omotegaki (表書き)** — the gift occasion label (e.g. 御祝, 御礼, 内祝, 御出産御祝)
- **Names (名前)** — the giver's name(s), up to several recipients
- **Style** — a choice of traditional noshi background designs and paper sizes (A4/B5, portrait/landscape)

No account required. Zero data stored. Everything renders in the browser via JavaScript canvas.

## Pages

- `/` or `/ja/` — Main generator (Japanese, default)
- `/en/` — Main generator (English)
- `/about` — About page

## Technical notes

- Rails 8 / Ruby 4.0, no database, fully stateless
- Frontend: Stimulus + html-to-image library for JPEG export
- Bilingual: Japanese (default) and English via Rails i18n

## Optional: Deep-link to a pre-filled noshi

You can link directly to a pre-filled form:

```
https://noshi.moab.jp/noshis/new/{ntype}/{names}/{omotegaki}
```

Example: `https://noshi.moab.jp/noshis/new/1/田中/御祝`
